auth.services_description: Kyan Library offers a range of distinguished services to provide our customers with a comfortable shopping experience, such as fast delivery service to all regions, with the ability to easily track orders, as well as flexible return and exchange options to ensure customer satisfaction. In addition, customers can benefit from shipping and packaging services for electronic occasions and pre-booking services for books and new releases, as well as the site provides loyalty tracking for users to collect points and benefit from exclusive discounts and offers.
auth.features_description: Kyan Library offers an easy and smooth shopping experience that allows users to browse a wide range of products from books and electronics to office supplies and educational games, which helps them quickly find products, with clear classifications and book lists according to new releases. It also allows users to access exclusive offers and discounts, in addition to secure and multiple payment options that suit everyone.

Our methodology is based on three pillar: Our methodology is based on three pillars: quality, sustainability, and innovation
methodology_content:
Hemma Real Estate operates with a clear strategic vision aimed at delivering real value in the Saudi real estate market by building an integrated marketing experience that highlights the quality of real estate products and helps clients make accurate and confident decisions.

Thanks to God, the company has earned wide trust from its clients, reflected in more than 400 positive reviews with an average rating of 4.9 out of 5 as of May 2025.

Hemma focuses on showcasing all real estate products — residential units and projects including apartments, villas, lands, townhouses, and penthouses — in a way that reflects their true advantages and meets the aspirations of clients, whether for premium living or long-term investment.

Work Principles

Hemma is guided by a set of principles that shape its operations and define its relationships with clients and partners:

  • Complete transparency in every interaction
  • High accuracy in execution standards
  • Continuous innovation in marketing methods
  • Ensuring customer satisfaction at every stage of the sales process

Our Services

Hemma Real Estate offers comprehensive real estate services, including:

  • Marketing and selling all types of real estate products (commercial and residential units: apartments, villas, townhouses, lands)
  • Marketing off-plan developments
  • Providing specialized real estate consultations for developers and investors
  • Delivering highly accurate feasibility studies and realistic pricing for real estate developers

Who We Serve

  • Individuals seeking a residential property or investment opportunity
  • Investors and companies looking to develop real estate projects
  • Real estate developers seeking a reliable marketing partner

What Sets Hemma Apart

  • Selecting strategic locations in the Central, Western, and Eastern regions
  • A modern marketing infrastructure relying on advanced digital tools
  • Consultants with more than 18 years of experience in the Saudi market
  • Tailored, highly accurate marketing plans for each project
  • Competitive pricing and flexible payment options
  • Operations built on high standards and data-driven methodologies

Success Stories

Hemma has contributed to marketing prominent projects in Riyadh, Jeddah, Madinah, Dammam, and Khobar, in addition to distinctive off-plan developments, achieving high sales rates in short periods — thanks first to God, and then to the integration of its marketing and consulting teams.

Key Achievements of 2024

Hemma recorded sales exceeding 1.5 billion SAR during 2024 by relying on:

  • Specialized consulting expertise
  • Precise digital marketing tools
  • Tailored marketing plans designed for each project’s needs

Company Overview

  • Founded: 2020
  • Headquarters: Al-Malqa District, Riyadh
  • Employees: Over 280 team members
  • Specialties: Residential and commercial real estate marketing, off-plan projects, developer consulting

Our Team

Hemma is led by a team of real estate experts, consultants, and digital marketing specialists, with more than 18 years of experience in the Saudi real estate sector.
The company believes that competence is the foundation of trust and long-term partnerships.

Our Future Direction

Hemma aims to expand its presence in the Saudi market by:

  • Strengthening its digital footprint
  • Establishing strategic partnerships with local developers
  • Adopting more innovative and effective marketing solutions

Client Testimonials

  • “Professional service and clear results in a short time.”
  • “A precise marketing plan and evident expertise from the very first visit.”
  • “Their partnership was a key factor in the project’s success.”

Contact Us

Whether you’re looking for an apartment, villa, floor unit, land, townhouse, or penthouse in Riyadh, Jeddah, Madinah, Makkah, Dammam, or Khobar — or you’re a developer seeking a strong and well-studied marketing partner — Hemma Real Estate is your ideal choice.

statistics.title: We operate according to a clear strategic vision aimed at delivering real value in the Saudi real estate market,
statistics.description: by building an integrated marketing experience that highlights the quality of the real estate product and helps clients make accurate and confident decisions.
